note: Self-contained Triton lowering-pipeline dissection index, distilled from triton-ppd. Regenerate with generate_pipeline.py.

convert_layout.what: Repartition a tensor from one layout encoding to another; physically lowered through shared memory.

produced_by.how: TTIR->TTGIR bridge assigns a default Blocked encoding; converts appear at layout boundaries
installs MMA encodings on dot ops, inserting converts around them
inserts a convert when a value's encoding differs from the target

eliminated_by.how: 3-run fixed-point GC: (1) bridge converts, (2) matmul/dot converts, (3) late pipeline/async-copy converts
clones the convert's backward slice in the target encoding
hoists a convert above broadcast / type-extend ops

lowered_by.how: matrix-vector product computing the layout transform
emits per-register LLVM indices for the converted tensor

convert_layout.notes: remove_layout_conversions appears 3x in make_ttgir as a fixed-point garbage collector for convert noise (golden-pass-list section 7).

coalesce.what: Reorder each memory op's Blocked encoding so adjacent lanes touch contiguous addresses, enabling wide vector loads (ld.global.v4) instead of scattered single-element accesses.

produced_by.how: bridge assigns a generic Blocked encoding, often NOT coalesced for the access pattern

eliminated_by.how: picks a per-op Blocked encoding whose fastest dim matches the contiguous memory dim; wraps in convert_layout
coalesces async-copy traffic on the Ampere path

lowered_by.how: queries the layout for the max contiguous run -> vector width
emits the vectorized load/store using that width

coalesce.notes: Coalescing is thesis optimization T3a; vector width comes from LinearLayout.getNumConsecutiveInOut() on the lane->addr sublayout.

pipeline.what: Software-pipeline loop loads: prefetch future iterations into multi-buffered shared memory with async copies so compute and memory overlap (Ampere SM 8.x).

produced_by.how: annotates each staged op with a pipeline latency
chooses producer/consumer ordering for the schedule

eliminated_by.how: materializes the async pipeline: inserts async_copy + async_wait, multi-buffers the shared allocation

lowered_by.how: merges async-copy traffic before LLVM lowering
lowers the staged local loads/stores to LLVM

pipeline.notes: SM 8.x only (Ampere async-copy). Hopper (SM 9+) uses TMA + warp specialization instead — out of the SM 7.5-8.9 slice.

shared_memory.what: Staging tensors in GPU shared memory for cross-thread exchange (e.g. layout conversion, matmul operands).

produced_by.how: MMA operands are staged in shared memory
software pipelining allocates multi-buffered shared memory

eliminated_by.how: assigns concrete shared-memory offsets to local_alloc ops

lowered_by.how: lowers local load/store to address calc + LLVM memory ops
encapsulates shared-memory base pointer and per-lane offsets

shared_memory.notes: Swizzling (SwizzledSharedEncoding) avoids bank conflicts; see encoding spec swizzled-shared-encoding.md.

mma.what: Tensor-core matrix multiply: BlockedEncoding dot operands are converted to MMA/DotOperand encodings, then lowered to mma.sync PTX.

produced_by.how: selects the MMA instruction shape and installs MmaEncoding

eliminated_by.how: lowers abstract MMA ops to target mma.sync form (NVIDIA)

lowered_by.how: emits mma.sync.* PTX inline asm per warp tile

mma.notes: MMAv2 (m16n8k16 fp16/bf16) is the in-slice target for SM 7.5-8.9.
